CREATE TABLE Geometries (id INT, geom VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO Geometries (id, geom) VALUES (1, st_point(0, 52));
INSERT INTO Geometries (id, geom) VALUES (2, st_polygonfromtext('POLYGON((30 10, 40 40, 20 40, 10 20, 30 10))'));
INSERT INTO Geometries (id, geom) VALUES (3, NULL);
SELECT isgeometry(geom) FROM Geometries WHERE id = 1;
SELECT isgeometry(geom) FROM Geometries WHERE id = 2;
SELECT isgeometry(geom) FROM Geometries WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id FROM Geometries WHERE isgeometry(geom) = 1;
CREATE TABLE Cities (city_name VARCHAR, location VARCHAR);
SELECT city_name FROM Cities WHERE isgeometry(location) = 0;
SELECT c.city_name FROM Cities c JOIN Geometries g ON isgeometry(g.geom) = 1 WHERE c.location = '0,52';
SELECT g.id, g.geom FROM Geometries g WHERE g.id IN (SELECT g2.id FROM Geometries g2 WHERE isgeometry(g2.geom) = 1);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Geometries WHERE isgeometry(geom);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Cities WHERE isgeometry(location) = 0;
SELECT CASE WHEN isgeometry(NULL) = 1 THEN 'Valid Geometry' ELSE 'Invalid Geometry' END AS GeometryValidity;
